tasks.label: Check skill key coverage
args:
from skills import SKILLS_DB
from skills_texts import SKILLS_TEXTS
db_keys = set(SKILLS_DB.keys())
st_keys = set(SKILLS_TEXTS.keys())
print('SKILLS_DB count:', len(db_keys))
print('SKILLS_TEXTS count:', len(st_keys))
print()
print('IN DB, NOT in TEXTS:')
for k in sorted(db_keys - st_keys):
    print(' ', k)
print()
print('IN TEXTS, NOT in DB:')
for k in sorted(st_keys - db_keys):
    print(' ', k)
print()
print('ALL DB keys:')
for k in sorted(db_keys):
    print(' ', k)
